text:
Deafness and Hearing Impairment - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 INTDIS_COMBINED Intellectual Disabilities and Related Conditions - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 INTDIS_MEDICAID Intellectual Disabilities and Related Conditions - Medicaid Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
